phrases.intent_en: Ask if the skate park is open today
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le skatepark est ouvert aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh skate-PARK eh oo-VAIR oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Darwin Écosystème is a former military barracks converted into a creative hub on the right bank of the Garonne, known for its urban art, skate park, and organic market.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the organic food market stalls are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les stands du marché bio, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay STAHND doo mar-SHAY BYOH seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Darwin hosts an organic farmer's market on weekend mornings with local producers from the Gironde region.

responses.english: At the back, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are co-working spaces available
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des espaces de coworking disponibles ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL day es-PASS duh ko-WAIR-keeng dees-poh-NEEBL ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Darwin is home to numerous start-ups, creative agencies, and offers flexible co-working spaces.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what events are on this weekend
phrases.text_local: Quels événements sont prévus ce week-end ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay-ven-MAHN son pray-VYU suh WEE-kend
phrases.cultural_note: Darwin regularly hosts concerts, exhibitions, and food events; check their website or the notice boards on site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the restaurant serves vegetarian options
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le restaurant propose des plats végétariens ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh res-toh-RAHN proh-POHZ day PLAH vay-zhay-tah-RYAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Darwin canteen and café emphasise locally sourced, organic, and often plant-based food.

responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah day op-SYOHN vay-zhay-tah-RYEHN
responses.french: Oui, il y a des options végétariennes.
